MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION
Off Calendar Oct-15-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Megan Winter, Esq. of Zimmerman & Kahanowitch, 818-710-7777 for defendants and moving parties 2121 LEAVENWORTH, LLC, GUY VAILLANCOURT, CHRISTOPHER VINCENT, VINCENT CONSTRUCTION GROUP, INC.
John O'Conner, Esq., 415-693-9960 for plaintiff and opposing party Edward Gamrin

RULING:
ARGUED and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows --
DEFENDANTS 2121 LEAVENWORTH, LLC, GUY VAILLANCOURT, CHRISTOPHER VINCENT, VINCENT CONSTRUCTION GROUP, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. Cause of action 1: Summary adjudication denied. Claim by defendant that liability insurance satisfies contractual obligation: triable issue of fact under contract language which provides for first party, not liability insurance. Claim re: repair issue: triable issue of fact regarding adequacy of door repair.
Cause of action 2: Summary adjudication granted. Burden shifted with factually devoid discovery responses. No triable issue of fact raised as to falsity of promise.
Cause of action 5: Summary adjudication denied. Triable issue of fact regarding nuisance raised by plaintiff's declaration that the construction next door caused his soil to subside.
Cause of action 6: Summary adjudication denied. Triable issue of fact regarding trespass created by declaration of Craig Herzog as to whether defendants exceeded the scope of their license.
Punitive damages: Summary adjudication denied. Defendant failed to shift burden of production. No special interrogatory regarding fraud, malice or oppression. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Judge: A. James Robertson II, Reporter: Carol Karen CSR #8189 (301/AJR)
